enrichment.summary: Kyle records a redo vlog after his computer crashed and lost the original recording. He recaps his day: waking up at 6am (7 hours sleep), dealing with traffic and snow on a hardware store run to buy filming lights, organizing his room, and discovering a major data error in bike race speed data he had printed out — a big discrepancy in speeds past 24 mph that he thought was perfect. He plans to fix the issue the next morning.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: finding a big problem late in the day
stances.position: Stop working when you find a problem that big; tackle it fresh the next day
Must fix immediately even if he didn't want to work on the page

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He also has a problem with his fluid trainer that needs fixing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hates having to redo videos or tasks.

transcript.text: So, I literally just recorded a video, but what happened was when I hit stop, I named the video, and then I hit stop, like close, to save it.
And so I hit save, and then there was this flash on my screen, and then the screen just turned black.
And then there was a flash on my screen, and then I hit another button, and then there was all these weird colors on my screen, and then the screen turned black.
And then I started hearing something in the background, like somebody walking around, and my computer wouldn't respond to me, so I had to restart my computer.
And then it restarted, and that video wasn't there. The one that I named and saved didn't get named and saved.
So I had to re-record the video again.
So, I hope this MacBook Pro doesn't die on me. This is my second one.
My first one died, suddenly died after like a year, and luckily it was still under warranty to get me another one.
So, okay, I hate doing videos again. I'll do it again.
So, yesterday, I got up. I got to sleep at 6, got up at 1.
That was 7 hours, and then I didn't get that much done during the day because it took me forever to get to the hardware store because there was lots of traffic and there was snow.
So, I got two lights, lights for filming, and I put them back up, and then I was organizing my room, and I just took up all day.
Okay, and then there was this really big problem.
I printed up all of the bike racing level stuff I did the other day, and so I was organizing it.
And then I realized at 24 miles an hour, the speeds get – there's a huge discrepancy in the speed as you go down.
And also, a lot of them are too long, so it's totally fucked. I didn't realize that.
I thought it was totally perfect. I had gone through it a million times. I thought that was perfect, and now I see all these flaws.
So, tomorrow – obviously, I'm not going to work anymore today whenever you find a problem like that's that big.
You would take a break or stop working, and it's already 6.33 starts to stop working.
So, I'll get up, and I'll try to fix it tomorrow, but it could cause problems because maybe I'll have to just, like, reprint everything and recut it,
Or I'll just have to repincil in all the stuff after 24, which is, like, right in the middle of the pack, so it's fucking really weird.
I don't know how that happened. And, yeah, I just found that out now.
So, I'll just get up. Tomorrow when I get up, I'll go and I'll fix it.
You know, normally, I really didn't want to have to work on a page on my website as I set this stuff up,
But if it turns out that it's totally fucked, then I have to fix it right away because I wanted to fix it so that I can print it up.
That's the same thing with this other one, the fluid trainer. The watts were all fucked.
I don't know how it got that way, but I was starting to fix that, but I didn't get that much through before I did other things.
So, anyway, that's what I'm going to do tomorrow when I get up, go to sleep now, when I get up at, like, 1 or 2.
I'm going to work on fixing the page until it's fixed again, until I find another flaw, but unbelievable.
Anyways, okay, so that's enough. I hate doing videos twice.
Okay, ciao.
